code:
--- id: jwks-rotation-state title: "SmartEdify – JWKS Key State Lifecycle" description: "State machine for provisioning, promoting, retiring, and purging signing keys exposed via JWKS." updated: 2025-02-14 tags: [Infra_EtcdCluster] --- stateDiagram-v2 [Infra_WorkerNode] --> Provisioning Provisioning --> Current: Activated Current --> Retiring: Key Rotation Initiated Retiring --> Deprecated: Grace Window Expired Deprecated --> Purge: TTL / Manual Cleanup Purge --> [Infra_IngressController] note right of Provisioning: Generate key pair
Store kid + created_at note right of Current: Signs new tokens
JWKS exposes kid note right of Retiring: Valid for verification only
New tokens use CURRENT note right of Deprecated: Should not verify (Infra_EtcdCluster) note right of Purge: Row deletion or archive

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个 JWKS 密钥生命周期的状态图。核心流程是：WorkerNode 触发 Provisioning，然后进入 Current 状态，经过 Rotation 后进入 Retiring，Grace Window 结束后变成 Deprecated，最后 Purge 到 IngressController。
明白了，几个细节想确认：Provisioning 到 Current 的触发条件叫什么？Retiring 到 Deprecated 是 Grace Window Expired 吗？还有 Deprecated 到 Purge 的触发条件是 TTL 还是手动清理？

对的，Provisioning → Current 是 "Activated"，Retiring → Deprecated 是 "Key Rotation Initiated" 之后 Grace Window 过期，Deprecated → Purge 可以是 TTL 到期或手动清理，标注成 "TTL / Manual Cleanup"。另外 Purge 的终点是 IngressController。
好的，主干状态流转已经画好。我注意到 Deprecated 状态需要特别标注一下 EtcdCluster 的约束，另外每个状态右侧需要加 note 说明行为吗？

需要加 note。Provisioning 旁边写 "Generate key pair, Store kid + created_at"；Current 写 "Signs new tokens, JWKS exposes kid"；Retiring 写 "Valid for verification only, New tokens use CURRENT"；Deprecated 写 "Should not verify (Infra_EtcdCluster)"；Purge 写 "Row deletion or archive"。
所有 note 已添加到对应状态右侧。标题定为 "SmartEdify – JWKS Key State Lifecycle"，描述写 "State machine for provisioning, promoting, retiring, and purging signing keys exposed via JWKS"，标签加上 Infra_EtcdCluster。
稍等，Retiring 的 note 描述需要调整。不是 "New tokens use CURRENT"，应该是 "New tokens use Current"，保持大小写一致。还有 Deprecated 的 note 里 EtcdCluster 的引用要确认准确。

已修复，Retiring 的 note 改为 "Valid for verification only, New tokens use Current"，Deprecated 的 note 保持 "Should not verify (Infra_EtcdCluster)"。整个状态图从 WorkerNode 开始，经过 Provisioning、Current、Retiring、Deprecated，最终 Purge 到 IngressController，完整闭环。
